de.uka.ilkd.key.control.instantiation_model

Class TacletFindModel

  • java.lang.Object

      • de.uka.ilkd.key.control.instantiation_model.TacletFindModel

    Serializable, TableModel

    public class TacletFindModel
extends AbstractTableModel

      • parseTerm

        private Term parseTerm(String s,
             Namespace varNS,
             Namespace functNS)
                throws ParserException
        parses the given string that represents the term (or formula) using the given variable namespace and the given namespace for functions and default namespaces for the others
        Parameters:
        s - the String to parse
        varNS - the variable namespace
        functNS - the function namespace
        Throws:
        ParserException

      • parseIdDeclaration

        private IdDeclaration parseIdDeclaration(String s)
                                  throws ParserException
        Parse the declaration of an identifier (i.e. the declaration of a variable or skolem function)
        Throws:
        ParserException

      • checkNeededInputAvailable

        private void checkNeededInputAvailable(int irow)
                                throws MissingInstantiationException
        throws an exception iff no input in indicated row, and no metavariable instantiation is possible
        Throws:
        MissingInstantiationException

      • isInputAvailable

        private boolean isInputAvailable(int irow)
        Returns:
        true iff this row is not empty (i.e. a string of data is available)

      • parseRow

        private Term parseRow(int irow,
            Namespace varNS,
            Namespace functNS)
               throws SVInstantiationParserException,
                      MissingInstantiationException
        parses the indicated row and returns a Term corresponding to the entry in the row
        Parameters:
        irow - the row to be parsed
        varNS - the variable namespace that will be passed to parseTerm
        functNS - the function namespace that will be passed to parseTerm
        Returns:
        the parsed term
        Throws:
        SVInstantiationParserException
        MissingInstantiationException

      • parseIdDeclaration

        private IdDeclaration parseIdDeclaration(int irow)
                                  throws SVInstantiationParserException,
                                         MissingInstantiationException
        parses the indicated row and returns a identifier declaration corresponding to the entry in the row
        Parameters:
        irow - the row to be parsed
        Returns:
        the parsed declaration
        Throws:
        SVInstantiationParserException
        MissingInstantiationException

      • parseRow

        private ProgramElement parseRow(int irow)
                         throws SVInstantiationParserException
        parses the indicated row and returns the ProgramElement corresponding to the entry in the row
        Parameters:
        irow - the row to be parsed
        Returns:
        the parsed term
        Throws:
        SVInstantiationParserException
